mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repair_order ( order_no, title, description, issue_type, urgency, status, applicant_id, department_id, asset_id, submit_time ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{title}, #{description}, #{issueType}, #{urgency}, #{status}, #{applicantId}, #{departmentId}, #{assetId}, #{submitTime} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
ro.id, ro.order_no, ro.title, ro.description, ro.issue_type, ro.urgency, ro.status, ro.applicant_id, applicant.real_name AS applicant_real_name, ro.department_id, d.dept_name, ro.asset_id, a.asset_no, a.asset_name, ro.assignee_id, assignee.real_name AS assignee_real_name, ro.reject_reason, ro.assign_time, ro.accept_time, ro.finish_time, ro.confirm_time, ro.submit_time, ro.create_time, ro.update_time
FROM repair_order ro
LEFT JOIN sys_user applicant ON ro.applicant_id = applicant.id AND applicant.is_deleted = 0
LEFT JOIN department d ON ro.department_id = d.id AND d.is_deleted = 0
LEFT JOIN asset a ON ro.asset_id = a.id AND a.is_deleted = 0
LEFT JOIN sys_user assignee ON ro.assignee_id = assignee.id AND assignee.is_deleted = 0
WHERE ro.id = #{id} AND ro.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
ro.id, ro.order_no, ro.title, ro.issue_type, ro.urgency, ro.status, ro.applicant_id, applicant.real_name AS applicant_real_name, ro.department_id, d.dept_name, ro.asset_id, a.asset_no, a.asset_name, ro.submit_time
FROM repair_order ro
LEFT JOIN sys_user applicant ON ro.applicant_id = applicant.id AND applicant.is_deleted = 0
LEFT JOIN department d ON ro.department_id = d.id AND d.is_deleted = 0
LEFT JOIN asset a ON ro.asset_id = a.id AND a.is_deleted = 0
AND ro.is_deleted = 0 AND ro.status = 0
AND ro.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
AND ro.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND ro.issue_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{issueType}, '%')
AND ro.urgency = #{urgency}
ORDER BY ro.urgency DESC, ro.submit_time ASC, ro.id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_order ro
AND ro.is_deleted = 0 AND ro.status = 0
AND ro.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
AND ro.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND ro.issue_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{issueType}, '%')
AND ro.urgency = #{urgency}

SELECT id, order_no, title, description, issue_type, urgency, status, applicant_id, department_id, asset_id, assignee_id, reject_reason, assign_time, accept_time, finish_time, confirm_time, submit_time, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM repair_order WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
